subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! In the Abhá Kingdom there is a station that is the ultimate aspiration of them that are nigh and the highest goal of those who are near [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی در ملکوت ابهی مقامیست که منتهی آمال مقربین و غایت آرزوی
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @love of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @spiritual transformation
